titleStmt.title: SII 18.95: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 95. (B.K. No. 63 of 1932-33.) HATTĪMATTŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab leaning against the front wall of the temple of Kōḍi Honnavva

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, corresponding to to A.D. 1088-89.

It describes the heroic fight of two brothers Jōga and Simga for their master Dēvugāṅka, the ūroḍeya of the agrahāra Pattiyamarttavura, during a cattle raid by Jannuga. It is stated that Paṭṭasāhaṇi, Daṇḍanāyaka Chāvuṇḍamayya was administering the agrahāra as aṇuga-jīvita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhamahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatri bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmatpaṭṭa sāhaṇi daṇḍanāyakaṁ cāvuṇḍamayyaṁgaḷagrahāraṁ pattiya
marttavuramanaṇugajīvitamūgi sukhadināḷuttamire . svasticāḷukyavikramakālada hadimūṟeneya vibhava saṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise . © kaṁda . ©
© sāramidu janada manake vicārisuvaḍe nōrppaḍannte marttavuraṁ tāṁ dhāriṇiya koraḷa muktāhārada māḷkeyavolagrahāramadesegu . kaṁda . ©
Intenisidūrggadhīśaṁ saṁtatamene visvamitragōtrapavitraṁ muṁntāda vairigaḷasurāṁta kanene dēvugāṁkana pogaḷadarāru . va . Antenisi negarṛdū
roḍeyapramukhamahājanavinnūrvvara pādāraviṁdarenisi . Oḷḷida guṇamuṁ dharmma mumeḷḷanituṁ dōṣamilladoḷkalitanamuṁ baḷḷa
davarggene negaṟdoḷḷāḷgaḷu jōgimayyanuṁ śāntiganu . ka . sale negaṟda martta vuramaṁ malahaṁ saṁdiṟdā caṭṭu muttida padadoḷge
lekōṁṭekhaṁḍivōdaḍe salegiṟidarnniṁdu jōganuṁ sāntiganu . ka . taṟisaṁdu kaligaḷirvvarumiṟiyalkērbbesananaṁdu meccuttāgaḷu
keṟeya keḷagaṟiye biṭṭarnneṟe sāsira kamma nelananaṁdinnūrvvaru . Antavarirvvaroḷaṁ sale sāntaṁgetanūbhavarkkaḷādarnnegaḻdā kantu
nibhaṁ nākaṇnaṁ saṁtatamēne nāgadēvanadhikaguṇāḍhya . ka . parahitacaritaṁ nākigamaraviṁdā nane samastaguṇanidhiyenisalu
karameseva vaḷajikabbegavara taneyaṁ siṁganeṁbanādaṁ pesariṁ . ka . saṁda guṇi nāgadēvaṁ giṁdunibhānaneyenippa rēkabbe
gamaṁntōdida guṇamuṁ peṁpuṁmugu[*ṁ]daleyenenegarṛda jōganādaṁ taneyaṁ . va . Antenisi baḷedu sukhamire . vri . jannuganu
ydanuḷḷa tuṟuvellamaneṁbudaneyde kēḷdu tānunnatakīrttiyūroḍeya dēvuganuṁ baḷi saṁda mātanāpannatarirvvaruṁ ne
ṟeye tāmaṟidāḷaninaṇnamuṁcavēḷkuṁ namageṁdu tāgidarasuṁgoḷe siṁganumane jōganuṁ . vri . Aḷkuṟadoḍḍidoḍḍaṇada nāyakaroṭṭoḍevannegaṁ mahā
baḷayutarirvvaruṁ peṇadu bhīmana harttana māḷkeyiṁ manaṁgoḷe sale dēvapāryya vibhu bhā®penalōrvvarinōrvvarōrvvaraggaḷamene kādida
rnnegaṟe siṁganumā kaliyappa jōganu . vāgida padadoḷu palarumanāgaḷ taḷiṟivu lāḷanaḍi modaloḷ tā jōganiradasti bīḷvudu mēgeyvono
pēḷiveṁdu nuḍidaṁ siṁgaṁ . vri . Enneya taṁmma niṁtu taṟisaṁdiṟidāḷdana muṁnte bi[®do]nāninnivanilli nōḍenenutuṁ piḍidirppene dēvugāṁkaniṁ munname .
sāyavērpudenutaṁkada bīraralli tūḷutuṁ jīya pōgaleṁdodaṟi tāgidanā kaliyappa siṁganu . ka . Antidirānnta balakke tatakaneṟe baccidaṁ le
lele kāleḍiyāḷo kuṁbhada kūraṁbinamāne tinrtiṇiyāgurbbe siṁganoṟaguva padadoḷ . ka . puridavesavalara sari ggaredandu surapaṭa
hamāgaḷaparasayadudaradavaranemage tamageṁdiraduydarnnegaṟe jōganuṁ siṁganumaṁ . © śivapādārādhakaṁ cāvarājaṁ baredī maṁgaḷa ©
Digital edition of SII 18.95 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
